title: cercis canadensis var. orbiculata
intro: Cercis canadensis var. orbiculata, also known as the eastern redbud or rounded-leaved redbud, is a deciduous shrub or small tree in the legume family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Cercis canadensis var. orbiculata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
